terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to SBay. By using our platform, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

general.title: 1. General Terms
general.content: SBay is an e-commerce platform connecting sellers and buyers in Syria. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to comply with these terms. You must be at least 18 years old to use the platform.

accounts.title: 2. Accounts & Registration
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and password. All information provided during registration must be accurate and up-to-date. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate our terms.

listings.title: 3. Listing Rules
listings.content: All listings must be for real products available for sale. Listing legally prohibited, counterfeit, or stolen products is forbidden. Descriptions and images must be accurate and represent the actual product.

transactions.title: 4. Transactions & Payment
transactions.content: SBay facilitates communication between sellers and buyers. All financial transactions are conducted directly between the parties. We are not responsible for any financial disputes between users.

prohibited.title: 5. Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.content: Using the platform for fraud, harassment, spam, or any illegal activity is prohibited. Attempting to circumvent platform systems or collecting other users' data is also forbidden.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: SBay operates as an intermediary platform and does not guarantee product quality or seller reliability. We are not responsible for any losses resulting from transactions between users. We always recommend verifying the product before purchase.

intellectual.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All platform content including the logo, design, and text are the property of SBay. Copying or using any platform content without prior permission is prohibited.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified of any material changes. Your continued use of the platform after modifications means you accept the updated terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At SBay, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use the SBay platform.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect information you provide during account registration and platform usage, including your name, email address, phone number, city, uploaded listing images, messages, transaction-related information, and technical usage data such as IP address, browser type, and device information.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to operate and improve the SBay platform, process transactions, provide customer support, enable communication between users, personalize your experience, maintain platform security, prevent fraud and abuse, and comply with legal obligations.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may share limited information with buyers and sellers as necessary to complete transactions, with trusted service providers who assist in operating the platform, or when required by law, legal process, or security obligations.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including encrypted data transmission where applicable. While we strive to protect your data, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies and Analytics
cookies.content: We may use cookies and similar technologies to improve platform functionality, remember user preferences, analyze usage patterns, and enhance user experience. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain personal information only as long as necessary to provide our services, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, enforce agreements, and maintain platform security.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: Depending on your location and applicable laws, you may have the right to access, correct, update, or request deletion of your personal data. You may also object to certain data processing activities. Requests can be submitted by contacting us directly.

deletion.title: 8. Account and Data Deletion
deletion.content: Users may request deletion of their account and associated data by visiting the account deletion page or contacting support. After verification, we will process deletion requests within a reasonable timeframe, unless retention is required for legal, fraud prevention, or security purposes.

children.title: 9. Children's Privacy
children.content: SBay is not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that such information has been collected, we will take appropriate steps to delete it.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes may be communicated through the platform, email notifications, or other appropriate methods. Continued use of SBay after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, your personal data, or account deletion requests, please contact us at support@syrian-bay.com.

about.title: About SBay
about.subtitle: Syria's Leading E-Commerce Platform
about.description: SBay is an e-commerce platform designed specifically for the Syrian market, aimed at facilitating online buying and selling in a safe and reliable way.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Provide an easy-to-use and secure e-commerce platform that serves the Syrian community, enabling individuals and small businesses to reach a wider market.

values.title: Our Values
values.trustDesc: We put user and transaction security first
values.communityDesc: Building an active and reliable e-commerce community
values.innovationDesc: Continuous development to deliver the best user experience

howItWorks.title: How SBay Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Start buying or selling in simple steps

browse.description: Search for products you want using search or browse categories

contact.description: Send the seller a message to ask about the product or negotiate the price

createAccount.question: How do I create an account on SBay?
createAccount.answer: Click 'Create Account' on the homepage, enter your email and choose a strong password, then complete your profile information.

resetPassword.question: I forgot my password, what do I do?
resetPassword.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your email. We'll send you a link to reset your password.

howToBuy.question: How do I buy a product?
howToBuy.answer: Browse available products and click on the one you want to see details. Contact the seller via the 'Contact Seller' button to agree on details.

howToSell.question: How do I sell a product?
howToSell.answer: Sign in and click 'Sell Product' from the menu. Add clear photos of your product, write an accurate title and description, and set the price and category.

isSafe.question: Is SBay safe to use?
isSafe.answer: Yes, we use advanced encryption technologies to protect your data. We also review listings and reports to maintain a safe environment. We always recommend verifying the product and seller before purchasing.

reportUser.question: How do I report a violating user?
reportUser.answer: You can report any user, listing, or message via the 'Report' button found on every page. Our team will review the report and take appropriate action.

editListing.question: How do I edit or delete my listing?
editListing.answer: Go to 'My Listings' from the dashboard and click 'Edit' next to the listing you want to modify. You can also delete the listing from the same page.

contactSupport.question: How do I contact support?
contactSupport.answer: You can reach us through the Contact Us page.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out to us in any way that suits you.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Your message has been sent successfully! We'll respond as soon as possible.

sellerGuide.title: Seller Guide
sellerGuide.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start selling on SBay

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.content: Create your account and complete your profile. Add a profile photo and write a bio to build buyer trust. Make sure to add a valid phone number and your city.

createListing.title: Creating a Successful Listing
createListing.content: Take clear, high-quality photos from multiple angles. Write a clear and specific title. Add a detailed description including condition and specifications. Set a fair price based on product condition and market value.

communication.title: Communicating with Buyers
communication.content: Respond to messages quickly and professionally. Be honest about product condition. Use SBay's built-in messaging system to keep a record of conversations.

shipping.title: Delivery & Shipping
shipping.content: Agree with the buyer on a suitable delivery method. You can arrange in-person delivery or use available shipping services. Make sure to package the product well.

tips.title: Tips for Success
tips.content: Update your listings regularly. Maintain a positive rating through excellent customer service. Price your products competitively.

fees.title: Fees & Commissions
fees.subtitle: SBay is free to use! Here are details about our services

premium.title: Premium Services (Coming Soon)
premium.description: We plan to offer optional premium services in the future to enhance the selling experience:

items.featured: Featured Listings - Higher visibility in search results
items.analytics: Advanced Analytics - Detailed statistics about your listings
items.verified: Verified Account - Verification badge to increase trust

fees.note: Note: All basic services will always remain free.

sellerProtection.title: Seller Protection
sellerProtection.subtitle: We are committed to protecting sellers on our platform

reporting.title: Reporting System
reporting.content: You can report any violating or fraudulent buyer. Our team reviews all reports and takes swift action against violators.

privacy.title: Data Protection
privacy.content: Your personal information is protected and not shared with third parties. Your phone number and email are not displayed publicly.

fraud.title: Fraud Prevention
fraud.content: We use advanced systems to detect suspicious accounts and fraudulent activity. We block violating users immediately.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.content: Our support team is available to help you with any issues. We work to resolve disputes fairly and quickly.

items.verify: Verify the buyer's identity before completing large transactions
items.meet: Meet in public places for in-person delivery

sellerTips.title: Selling Tips
sellerTips.subtitle: Achieve more sales with these proven tips

photos.title: Professional Photos
photos.content: Use good natural lighting. Take photos from multiple angles. Show important details and any defects. Use a clean, simple background.

description.title: Detailed Description
description.content: Write a clear title with keywords. List full product specifications. Be honest about product condition. Add warranty information if available.

pricing.title: Smart Pricing
pricing.content: Research prices of similar products. Set a competitive price reflecting product condition. Be ready to negotiate but set a minimum price in advance.

response.title: Quick Response
response.content: Reply to buyer messages as quickly as possible. Sellers who respond faster achieve more sales. Enable notifications to receive alerts instantly.

reputation.title: Building Reputation
reputation.content: Provide excellent service to every buyer. Positive reviews increase new buyer trust. Be honest and professional in all your dealings.

validation.xss: Input contains disallowed HTML or script content.

deleteAccount.title: Account and Data Deletion
deleteAccount.intro: Users may request deletion of their SBay account and associated personal data by contacting us at:
deleteAccount.verification: Please include the email address associated with your SBay account so we can verify and process your request.
deleteAccount.retention: Some data may be retained temporarily where required for legal, security, fraud prevention, or operational purposes.
deleteAccount.processingTime: Deletion requests are typically processed within 30 days after verification.
